misc: Has a habit of getting lost on golf course grounds
Does not spit in the glass
biography: Representing Revontuli Golf, Janne has established himself as a dedicated figure within the Hector Trophée, having made eight appearances in this distinctive pair competition. While he remains an active participant in broader Hector events, Janne will not be among the field for the forthcoming Hector Trophée 2026.

Throughout his extensive history on the tournament's challenging fairways, Janne has consistently applied himself with diligence. Despite his considerable efforts across his eight participations, neither the coveted Hector Trophée for the winning pair nor the individual Victor Trophy has, to date, been secured. His journey stands as a testament to persistent engagement and an unwavering love for the game, underscoring a commitment that transcends immediate triumphs.

Beyond the competitive results, Janne is celebrated for a truly unique presence. He possesses a notable habit of sometimes straying from the direct path on the course, navigating its terrain with a singular, often circuitous, approach that occasionally sees him exploring the less trodden parts of the golf course grounds. This characteristic, however, is balanced by his remarkably generous spirit and an unimpeachable integrity, a player who truly "does not spit in the glass," always conducting himself with honor and camaraderie among his peers.

His consistent involvement in the past and continued activity in other Hector events suggest that a future return to the Trophée's fairways is always a possibility, as he continues his quest for that elusive first victory in this esteemed annual competition.
